title: Warps To Waypoints
description: Convert EssentialsX warps to Xaero's Minimap waypoints
body:
# Usage
Join a server that has [EssentialsX](https://essentialsx.net/) installed and run the command:
```
/warps2waypoints
```
This will grab the names of all available warps and automatically run `/warpinfo` to find their coordinates. Run the command again to check for new warps. Be aware that if the server has a lot of warps, this will spam your chat (only for you, not other players) and some servers might not like you running a ton of commands at once.

If a warp gets moved, you can run:
```
/warps2waypoints <warp name>
```
to update the position of its waypoint.

---

The waypoint creation code is heavily based on [Xaero's Waystones Compatibility](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap-world-map-waystones-compatibility-forge).
